title: Ludwig II of Bavaria becomes King of Bavaria
fact: Ludwig II, also called the Swan King or the Fairy Tale King, was King of Bavaria from 1864 until his death in 1886.

title: Ludwig III of Bavaria becomes King of Bavaria
fact: Ludwig III was the last King of Bavaria, reigning from 1913 to 1918.

title: Maximilian I Joseph of Bavaria becomes King of Bavaria
fact: Maximilian I Joseph was Duke of Zweibrücken from 1795 to 1799, prince-elector of Bavaria from 1799 to 1806, then King of Bavaria from 1806 to 1825.

title: Ludwig I of Bavaria becomes King of Bavaria
fact: Ludwig I or Louis I was King of Bavaria from 1825 until the 1848 revolutions in the German states.

title: Otto, King of Bavaria becomes King of Bavaria
fact: Otto was King of Bavaria from 1886 until 1913.

title: Maximilian II of Bavaria becomes King of Bavaria
fact: Maximilian II reigned as King of Bavaria between 1848 and 1864.
